rules.desc: Anatomical proportion accuracy — limb length, joint placement, mass distribution
rules.rationale_pass: Proportions are anatomically sound — limbs, joints, and mass read correctly (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Proportion errors — limb length, joint placement, or mass distribution incorrect (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Consistent head-to-body ratio across all views and poses
rules.rationale_pass: Head-to-body ratio is consistent across views (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Head-to-body ratio drifts between views — character reads as different heights (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Gesture clarity — pose communicates intent, weight, and emotion
rules.rationale_pass: Gesture reads clearly — pose communicates intent and weight (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Gesture is stiff or ambiguous — pose does not communicate intent (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Costume logic — layers make functional sense, nothing floats or clips irrationally
rules.rationale_pass: Costume logic holds — layers are functional and physically plausible (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Costume logic broken — floating elements, impossible layers, or nonsensical construction (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Costume consistency across poses and views — same garments, same details
rules.rationale_pass: Costume is consistent across poses and views — details match (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Costume changes between views — missing details, altered garments, or inconsistent accessories (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Personality read — character is recognizable by silhouette alone
rules.rationale_pass: Character reads at silhouette level — distinct and recognizable (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Character is generic — silhouette is not distinctive or recognizable (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Style consistency across the project — rendering, line quality, color treatment match
rules.rationale_pass: Style is consistent with the project — rendering and color treatment match (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Style drifts from project standard — rendering or color treatment inconsistent (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Turnaround accuracy — same character from all angles, proportions hold in rotation
rules.rationale_pass: Turnaround is accurate — character holds across all rotation angles (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Turnaround breaks — proportions, costume, or features change between angles (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Expression range — emotions read clearly and the face stays on-model
rules.rationale_pass: Expressions read clearly — face stays on-model across emotions (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Expressions are muddy or off-model — emotions do not read clearly (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Action readability — dynamic poses have clear silhouette and readable motion
rules.rationale_pass: Action reads clearly — silhouette and motion are unambiguous (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Action is unreadable — tangled limbs, unclear silhouette, or static feel (${scorePct}%)
